name: Cleveland-Cliffs Inc.

profile.description: Cleveland-Cliffs is the largest flat-rolled steel producer in North America, operating integrated steel mills and iron ore mining operations. CEO Lourenco Goncalves has led an aggressive acquisition strategy including AK Steel and ArcelorMittal USA.
